history.query: Simulate CO2 in HKUST-1 at 298K

Perform a GCMC simulation of CO2 adsorption at 298 K and 1 bar on a high surface area microporous MOF. Use TraPPE for CO2, and run 5000 production cycles after 1000 initialization cycles. Report absolute loading in mol/kg and cm3(STP)/g.
Perform a series of GCMC simulations to generate a CO2 adsorption isotherm at 298 K on a high surface area microporous MOF. Use the TraPPE force field for CO2.
